category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances exported from China compared with Malaysia (ST / SIRIM) requirements for energy, safety, EMC-radio scope, refrigerant practice, and market-entry process.

title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入马来西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入馬來西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China household refrigerator documentation against Malaysia requirements for ST-controlled entry, SIRIM certification, CoA-based safety control, energy labelling and MEPS, MCMC wireless scope checks, refrigerant handling, and market-access workflow versus China GB/GB/T baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用冰箱与马来西亚ST管控、SIRIM认证、基于批准证书的安全管控、能效标签与MEPS、MCMC无线频谱范围、制冷剂处理以及进口准入流程，对比中国GB/GBT基准。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用冰箱與馬來西亞ST管控、SIRIM認證、基於批准證書的安全管控、能效標籤與MEPS、MCMC無線頻譜範圍、製冷劑處理以及進口准入流程，對比中國GB/GBT基準。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and logistics teams should verify current Malaysia Energy Commission, SIRIM, MCMC, and customs requirements directly before shipment or placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及物流团队在出货或投放前应直接核验现行马来西亚能源委员会（ST）、SIRIM、MCMC及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及物流團隊在出貨或投放前應直接核驗現行馬來西亞能源委員會（ST）、SIRIM、MCMC及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For refrigerators, Malaysia is typically controlled by the ST-SIRIM route rather than Chinese CCC transfer, with mandatory alignment to 240 V, 50 Hz documentation, MS IEC safety baseline, MEPS/star labelling, and in-country importer handling through destination documentation. R-600a can still be used where tested design limits allow it, but source claims must match Malaysia scope.
answer_first.zh: 对于中国家电冰箱而言，马来西亚通常采用ST-SIRIM路线而非中国CCC直接转移，核心差异是240V、50Hz参数文件、MS IEC安全基准、MEPS/星级能效标签及目的地进口商主导的文件闭环。等压R-600a仍可沿用，但必须符合马来西亚适用范围和证据链。
answer_first.zht: 對於中國家電冰箱而言，馬來西亞通常採用ST-SIRIM路線而非中國CCC直接轉移，核心差異是240V、50Hz參數文件、MS IEC安全基準、MEPS/星級能效標籤及目的地進口商主導的文件閉環。等壓R-600a仍可沿用，但必須符合馬來西亞適用範圍和證據鏈。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Re-run source checks every quarter and update mandatory_status and official-link evidence after any ST, SIRIM, MCMC or customs rule changes.
